user.title: Generac Mobile Link
user.description: Enter your Mobile Link username (email). The next step explains how to copy a session cookie from your browser.

login_guidance.title: Copy your Mobile Link cookie
login_guidance.description:
### Before you start
- Use **Chrome** or **Edge** on a computer (recommended by Mobile Link).
- Log in at [{login_url}]({login_url}) as **{username}**.
- Complete any CAPTCHA and wait until the **dashboard shows your propane tank(s)**.

### Open Developer Tools
1. Press **F12** (or right-click the page → **Inspect**).
2. Open the **Network** tab.
3. Click the **Fetch/XHR** filter (Chrome/Edge) so only API calls are shown.
4. Optional: check **Preserve log**, then press **Ctrl+R** to refresh once.

### Select the correct request
In the request list, find the API call whose **Name** is **`list`** and whose **Path/URL** ends with:
`/api/v2/Apparatus/list`

**Select this request — not:**
- `dashboard` (the HTML page)
- CSS, JS, font, or image files
- `Account`, `Subscription`, `MessageCenter`, or analytics/telemetry calls

### Confirm it is the right request
With `list` selected, open the **Headers** tab:
- **Request URL** should be `https://app.mobilelinkgen.com/api/v2/Apparatus/list`
- **Request Method** should be **GET**
- **Status Code** should be **200**

Open the **Response** or **Preview** tab and confirm you see JSON containing your tank name and a `FuelLevel` value. If you see HTML or a login page, your session is not ready — log in again and repeat.

### Copy the cookie
Still on the **Headers** tab, scroll to **Request Headers** and find **`cookie`** (Chrome/Edge may show it lowercase).
1. Copy the **entire cookie value** (the long text after `cookie:`), **or**
2. Right-click the `list` request → **Copy** → **Copy as cURL** and paste that here.

**Accepted paste formats:** raw cookie value, a `Cookie: ...` line, copied request headers, or a curl command.

### Paste below

select_tanks.title: Select propane tanks
select_tanks.description: Choose which propane tanks to add to Home Assistant.

reauth_guidance.title: Re-authenticate Mobile Link
reauth_guidance.description:
Your Mobile Link session has expired for **{username}**.

1. Log in again at [{login_url}]({login_url}).
2. Open **F12 → Network → Fetch/XHR**.
3. Refresh the dashboard.
4. Select the **`list`** request to `/api/v2/Apparatus/list` (status **200**).
5. Copy the **`cookie`** value from **Request Headers** (or paste a **Copy as cURL** command).
6. Paste it below.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid or expired cookie. Log in again, copy the cookie from the /api/v2/Apparatus/list request (status 200), and paste it here.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Mobile Link. Check your network connection and cookie.
error.no_tanks_selected: Select at least one propane tank.

abort.already_configured: This Mobile Link account is already configured.
abort.no_tanks: No propane tanks were found for this account.
